paragraphs: Fermi Inc.'s stock price is 6.12 as of the last update, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. The company has had one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which was reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026. The earnings call is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a total of 25 filings in the feed, with one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms, which disclose information such as the issuance of convertible senior notes and the resignation of a director.
